[![Built with love](https://ForTheBadge.com/images/badges/built-with-love.svg)](https://ForTheBadge.com/images/badges/built-with-love.svg)

This package represents database access modules for the SweetRPG project.

## Documentation

Documentation for this package can be found [here](https://sweetrpg.github.io/db).

modules.name: sweetrpg_db.mongodb.options
documentation: -*- coding: utf-8 -*-

variables.name: sweetrpg_db.mongodb.options.__author__
documentation: Query options for accessing MongoDB.

classes.name: sweetrpg_db.mongodb.options.QueryOptions

methods.name: sweetrpg_db.mongodb.options.QueryOptions.__init__
documentation:
Initialize the QueryOptions object.
:param dict filters: A dictionary of filters to apply to the query.
:param list projection: A list of attribute names to include in the returned result. If `None`, all attributes are returned.
:param int skip: An offset to use for pagination.
:param int limit: The maximum number of results to return.
:param list sort: A list of key-value pairs specifying the attributes to sort on.

methods.name: sweetrpg_db.mongodb.options.QueryOptions.set_filters
documentation:
Sets filters for the query.

:param dict filters: A dictionary of filters to set.
:param list from_querystring: Filters to set in querystring format.

methods.name: sweetrpg_db.mongodb.options.QueryOptions.set_projection
documentation:
Sets projections for the query.

:param list projection: A list of field names to include in the query results.
:param list from_querystring: Projections to set in querystring format.

methods.name: sweetrpg_db.mongodb.options.QueryOptions.set_sort
documentation:
Sets sorting for the query results.

:param list sort: A list of dictionaries containing field name and ordering.
:param list from_querystring: Sorts to set in querystring format.
An object to store query options for a PyMongo find*() call.

modules.name: sweetrpg_db.mongodb.repo
documentation: -*- coding: utf-8 -*-

variables.name: sweetrpg_db.mongodb.repo.__author__
documentation: MongoDB repository module.

classes.name: sweetrpg_db.mongodb.repo.MongoDataRepository

methods.name: sweetrpg_db.mongodb.repo.MongoDataRepository.__init__
documentation:
Create a MongoDB repository instance.

```
param kwargs

Keyword arguments for setting up the repository connection.

key model

The class of the model for this connection.

key document

The class of the document for this connection.

key db

A  object used for connecting to the database.
```

methods.name: sweetrpg_db.mongodb.repo.MongoDataRepository._handle_value
documentation:
Convert a value to a string.

```
param any value

The value to convert. Supports ,
, , and lists of
any of those types.

return str

A string of the specified value.
```

methods.name: sweetrpg_db.mongodb.repo.MongoDataRepository._modify_record
documentation:
Modify a record by converting any values to strings, and renaming the internal '_id'
    field to 'id'.

:param dict record: The record to modify.
:return dict: The modified record.

methods.name: sweetrpg_db.mongodb.repo.MongoDataRepository.create
documentation:
Inserts a new object in the database with the data provided.

:param dict data: The data for the object
:return Document: The inserted document.

methods.name: sweetrpg_db.mongodb.repo.MongoDataRepository.get
documentation:
Fetch a single record from the database.

:param str record_id: The identifier for the record to fetch. This value is compared against the attribute specified in `id_attr`.
:param bool deleted: Include "deleted" objects in the query
:return Document: An instance of the object type from `model_class`.

methods.name: sweetrpg_db.mongodb.repo.MongoDataRepository.query
documentation:
Perform a query for objects in the database.

:param QueryOptions options: (Optional) Options specifying limits to the query's returned results
:return list: Returns a list of Document-subclass instances matching the query.

methods.name: sweetrpg_db.mongodb.repo.MongoDataRepository.update
documentation:
Update the specified record.

:param str record_id: The ID of the record to update.
:param dict update: The data to update for the record.
:param bool deleted: Indicates whether the update operation should look for deleted records.
:return Document: The update version of the object.

methods.name: sweetrpg_db.mongodb.repo.MongoDataRepository.delete
documentation:
'Delete' the specified record. Deletion is accomplished by setting the `deleted_at` field to the current

: timestamp, so that queries for the object will ignore it.

```
param str record_id

The record ID of the object to delete. This can be a string or .

param bool actually

Actually delete the record instead of just marking it "deleted".

return bool

A boolean indicating whether the record was able to be marked deleted.

raises DoesNotExist

```
A repository class for interacting with a MongoDB database.
